description: You are a labor relations specialist. Open the raw draft of the collective bargaining agreement update at ~/Documents/CBA_Draft.docx in WPS Writer and format it into a formal redlined tentative agreement. Apply 'Heading 1' style to all Article titles and 'Heading 2' style to all Section titles, and insert an automated Table of Contents at the beginning of the document. In Article 3, format the Grievance Procedure steps as a Numbered List. In Article 7, convert the wage progression data into a 5-column table with a bold header row. For the redlining, apply Strikethrough to '15%' and Bold/Underline to '18%' in Article 11, and apply Strikethrough to 'twenty-four (24) hours' and Bold/Underline to 'forty-eight (48) hours' in Article 5. Include a footer on all pages with the centered text 'Tentative Agreement - Pending Ratification' and the Page Number. Save the final document to ~/Documents/CBA_Tentative_Agreement.docx.
